_publications._publicationTitle: Suppression of proliferation of two independent NF1 malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cell lines by the pan-ErbB inhibitor CI-1033.

_contextSnippet: STS-26T cells express neurofibromin and maintain lower levels of basal Ras activity
details: Expresses neurofibromin and maintains lower levels of basal Ras activity, with lower EGFR and ErbB2 expression than NF1 lines
